mapper.select: select u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.avatar, u.manager_id as managerId, a.name as managerName, u.phone, u.email, u.create_time as createTime from user u left join admin a on u.manager_id = a.id where u.manager_id = #{managerId} order by u.id desc

select u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.avatar, u.manager_id as managerId, a.name as managerName, u.phone, u.email, u.create_time as createTime from user u left join admin a on u.manager_id = a.id where u.id = #{id}
select id, username, password, name, avatar, manager_id as managerId, phone, email, create_time as createTime from user where username = #{username} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, name, avatar, manager_id, phone, email) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{avatar}, #{managerId}, #{phone}, #{email})
